title: AN ACT RENAMING THE CIRCUMFERENTIAL ROUTE NO. 5 OR C-5 IN METRO MANILA, AS THE PRESIDENT GARCIA AVENUE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

chunks.text:
H. No. 6889 / 93 OG No. 3, 327 (Jan. 20, 1997)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8224, November 06, 1996 ]

AN ACT RENAMING THE CIRCUMFERENTIAL ROUTE NO. 5 OR C-5 IN METRO MANILA, AS THE PRESIDENT GARCIA AVENUE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of the Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled;

SECTION 1. President Carlos P. Garcia served with distinction as congressman, senator, viceâpresident, and president of the Republic of the Philippines. He was also the first president of the 1971 Constitutional Convention.

SEC. 2. To perpetuate his memory, the Circumferential Route No. 5 or C-5 in Metro Manila, is hereby renamed as the President Garcia Avenue.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, November 6, 1996.
